name: Davide Giovanardi

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
base_bullets: Spearheaded the development of LLM-based reasoning and agentic systems for automating customer support and internal workflows, improving operational efficiency and reducing reliance on manual processes.
Applied advanced fine-tuning techniques (DPO, RFT) to improve model alignment, robustness, and performance across production use cases.
Designed and implemented scalable evaluation frameworks to benchmark agent behavior, enabling continuous improvement through feedback-driven optimization and real-time performance monitoring.
Deployed scalable, low-latency AI systems into production, ensuring reliability, fault tolerance, and consistent performance for high-volume user interactions.
Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders to integrate machine learning systems into production workflows, improving response accuracy, latency, and overall user experience.
Built and maintained data pipelines and ETL workflows (Spark, PySpark) to support large-scale model training, evaluation, and deployment, ensuring high data quality and system reliability.
Modernized data infrastructure into scalable, cloud-native architectures, improving efficiency, maintainability, and integration with downstream analytics and monitoring systems.
Developed monitoring systems for model drift, performance degradation, and anomalies, enabling real-time diagnostics and maintaining production system reliability.
Optimized cloud infrastructure and distributed systems, reducing operational costs while maintaining high availability and performance under peak load.
Implemented guardrails and safety layers for LLM outputs, reducing harmful or low-quality responses in user-facing applications.
Designed prompt and retrieval optimization strategies for RAG systems, improving answer relevance and grounding in production environments.
Introduced A/B testing frameworks for LLM systems, enabling data-driven evaluation of model improvements and feature releases.
Developed internal tooling for debugging and analyzing LLM outputs, accelerating iteration cycles and improving model reliability.
Led efforts to standardize evaluation metrics and benchmarking across multiple LLM use cases, improving consistency in model performance assessment.
Collaborated with infrastructure teams to optimize inference throughput and latency, improving system performance under high-concurrency workloads.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
base_bullets: Led development of real-time NLP systems for meeting summaries, captions, and insights, serving millions of users globally.
Engineered multilingual NLP solutions supporting 30+ languages, enabling scalable global deployment and improved accessibility.
Implemented techniques to reduce hallucinations and improve accuracy of AI-generated content, ensuring contextual relevance and reliability.
Developed and deployed LLM-based evaluation systems to continuously assess and improve content quality, factual accuracy, and coherence.
Built systems integrated with Zoom’s platform to automate meeting notes, summaries, and action item generation, improving user productivity.
Improved accuracy and relevance of AI-generated content by 20% through evaluation and feedback-driven optimization.
Applied deep learning models to enhance real-time transcription and translation quality across diverse languages and dialects.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver AI features aligned with product needs and user impact.
Led deployment of AI models at scale, ensuring low-latency performance and reliability across millions of users.
Contributed to patent filings in NLP and generative AI for meeting understanding and summarization systems.
Developed internal tools to analyze and debug model outputs, improving iteration speed and model quality for real-time NLP systems.
Optimized inference pipelines for real-time transcription and summarization, reducing latency and improving user experience.
Contributed to experimentation frameworks enabling continuous evaluation and improvement of NLP models in production.

experience.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
base_bullets: Assisted in delivering course content for the Stanford CS 224N NLP with Deep Learning class, providing students with hands-on experience in implementing state-of-the-art NLP algorithms.
Conducted office hours where students received guidance on deep learning topics like neural networks, transformers, and advanced NLP techniques.
Provided feedback and grading for assignments that involved coding and theoretical questions on topics such as machine learning, NLP, and deep learning.
Worked closely with professors to design course materials, ensuring that students had access to the latest advancements in machine learning and NLP research.
Offered direct support to students working on individual research projects, helping them develop practical solutions and refine their models.

experience.title: AI & Machine Learning Associate
base_bullets: Developed machine learning models to support real-time volatility forecasting for FX options pricing, enabling traders to make more informed decisions.
Built AutoML pipelines that enhanced the efficiency of modeling workflows, reducing the time required for model training and evaluation while improving accuracy.
Integrated machine learning models into JPMorgan’s financial systems, helping to automate time-consuming tasks and improve the accuracy of key financial predictions.
Collaborated with quantitative analysts to optimize the pricing models, improving the robustness of financial risk models for real-time use in volatile markets.
Conducted exploratory data analysis to identify hidden patterns in financial datasets, helping to improve predictive models for currency trading.

experience.title: Machine Learning Intern
base_bullets: Implemented machine learning algorithms to model network traffic across data centers and guide business decisions to optimize traffic and improve efficiency.
Designed and developed ML models that automate the performance analysis of Intel's data transfer algorithms.

education.degree: MS Computational and Mathematical Engineering, Computer Science
